title: Government warning title case 'Government Warning' (distance-downsample, level 7, sideways)
image_prompt: Photorealistic amber glass bottle with a fox illustration label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Copper Fox', 'Bourbon Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Fox Distillers, Lexington, KY'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'Government Warning: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: FAIL compliance (Government Warning not in ALL CAPS)
visualObservation: Visual note: label was photographed from too far away with moderate downsampling. Camera orientation is sideways (90 degrees). The photo is sideways and may need rotation before automated approval.
